subcodes.first_line: O Hadi! Be thou patient in what hath befallen thee and Us from the manifest and irrevocable decree, and place thy trust in [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا هادی فاصبر علی ما اصابک و اصابنا من القضاء المبرم المشهود فتوکل علی
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
